EXP Bank Calculator
URL: https://torturado.github.io

Summary:
- Static calculator for EXP Bank gem growth.
- Fixed daily interest rate: 0.50%.
- No login, no HTTP API, no OAuth, no MCP server.

Important URLs:
- https://torturado.github.io/
- https://torturado.github.io/faq
- https://torturado.github.io/agents.md
- https://torturado.github.io/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json

Agent notes:
- Prefer WebMCP on the homepage when available.
- Otherwise read /agents.md and use the UI manually.
- This site is hosted on GitHub Pages, so custom response headers and true markdown content negotiation are not available from code alone.
